---
title: "Draft Quarto document"
author: "Your Name"
format: html
---

## Header 1

```{r setup}
library(tidyverse)
library(here)
library(snakecase)
```

```{r}
# Code chunk
```
## Importing new data
```{r}
here("data-raw/nurses-stress/stress/5C/5C_1586886626/HR.csv.gz") |>
  read_csv(
    show_col_types = FALSE,
    name_repair = to_snake_case,
    n_max = 100
  )
```
